zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clopton於1450年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親John Clopton27歲，母親Alice Darcy23歲。他於大約1475年與Joan Marrow在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年2月28日在英國英格蘭素福爾可肯特維爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clopton于1450年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲John Clopton27岁，母亲Alice Darcy23岁。他于大约1475年与Joan Marrow在英国英格兰米德萊可斯特普尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年2月28日在英国英格兰素福爾可肯特維爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clopton was born in 1450, in Essex, England, his father, John Clopton, was 27 and his mother, Alice Darcy, was 23. He married Joan Marrow about 1475, in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 February 1530, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clopton est né en 1450, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Clopton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Darcy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Marrow environ 1475, à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1530, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Clopton 1450 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Clopton 27 und seine Mutter Alice Darcy 23. Er hat um 1475 in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Joan Marrow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1530 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Clopton è nato il nel 1450 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, John Clopton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Darcy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Marrow circa 1475, nel Stepney, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1530, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Cloptonが1450年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父John Cloptonは27歳，母Alice Darcyは23歳であった。約1475年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーでJoan Marrowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年2月28日にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントウエルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Clopton(이)가 1450년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clopton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Darcy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니에서 Joan Marrow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄트웰에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clopton nasceu em 1450, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Clopton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Darcy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Marrow aproximadamente 1475, em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1530, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clopton родился в 1450 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Clopton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Darcy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marrow около 1475 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 февраля 1530 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Marrow aproximadamente 1475, en Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1530, en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
